rationale: Fin. Code §351.054 governs tax lien transferee filing requirements with taxing unit collectors. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A transferee of a tax lien must include with the sworn document executed by the borrower and filed with the collector of a taxing unit under Section 32.06(a-1), Tax Code, the information required by this section.
_note: Rule concerns tax lien transfer notice procedures, not homestead exemption levels. No interaction with proposed change.
